title: Leafy Poultice
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Defends[/gold] and lose [blue]12[/blue] Max HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Transforms exactly 1 Strike (Basic rarity) and 1 Defend (Basic rarity) card from your deck. If either card type is not found in your deck, only the available card is transformed.
